creator: taguchi@tohoku.iij.ad.jp
text:
PLIST files in ${PORTSDIR}/x11/tk42 and ${PORTSDIR}/japanese/tk42 do
NOT contain some files. 

# Sorry, I forgot them...

This makes some probrems.
1. can not start Kana-Kanji conversion (JP only).
2. warning message on "wish" startup.
3. can not use some build-in widgets.
4. demo script does not work collectry.

Fix: I made a patch. please apply it.
